productDisplayName: Reebok Men Active  Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: These high-performance Active Sport shoes from reebok are designed for comfort and stability while you take that power run or work out in the gym. Wear these with a tonal t-shirt from nike and track pants.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays on the toe box, midfoot and heelCentral lace upsPadded tongue with mesh liningPadded insole for instep comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticDMX foam technologyMidsoleEVA midsole OutsoleRubber outsole with diamond patterned grooves and lugs and a decoupled heelFlex grooves channels for the shoe to bend and flex properly with the natural motion of the footShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
